title: NOPE! Rat Killer Grain Bait 6 x 25g | Super Strength Poison Sachets | Single Feed Premium Oat Grain Bait | Quick-Acting Rodent Control and Mouse Killer | Works Outdoors in All Weather
features: Super Strength, Easy-To-Use Rat Poison: Only one feed needed to kill rats and mice. Unlike other rat bait, rats have zero genetic resistance to the fast-acting NOPE! formula. Compatible with NOPE Rat Bait Station.

Zero-Touch Oat Grain Bait: Pre-sealed rat poisoning super strength sachets eliminate handling risks and protect against weather and mould for long effective life. Rodents nibble through precisely measured sachets to reach rat bait.

For Best Results: Place in areas of rodent activity - nesting sites, burrows, travel paths in gardens and buildings - close to walls and away from other food sources. As rats are naturally cautious (neophobic), bait pick-up may take some time after deployment.
Responsibly Designed: Infused with a bitterant to prevent ingestion in wildlife, pets and children while remaining tasty to rats. Bright blue bait for easy identification & max visibility.
One Rodent Control for Common UK Species: Brown Rats, Black Rats and House Mice can’t resist the super-strength brodifacoum rat bait (0.0025% w/w).
description: Product Description NOPE! Rat Killer is a potent and professional rodenticide that effectively targets both rats and mice in household, agricultural, and commercial environments. Formulated with brodifacoum, one of the UK’s strongest and most reliable active ingredients, this advanced bait eradicates rodent infestations quickly and efficiently. Each pre-measured grain sachet contains a bittering agent to deter non-target species and a visible dye for straightforward identification, ensuring a safer deployment process. Highly palatable to rodents, these single-feed sachets encourage rapid acceptance, reducing the likelihood of bait shyness and creating the ideal solution for managing persistent rat and mice problems. By placing sachets in the NOPE! Rodent Bait Box, users can secure them properly out of reach of children, pets and wildlife such as foxes, birds and hedgehogs. For best results, place bait stations in areas of high rodent activity, such as runways, nesting sites or near potential entry points. Minimising alternative food sources and keeping surroundings clean helps motivate rats and mice to feed on the poison bait. The delayed action of brodifacoum means rodents continue to consume NOPE! Rat Killer before symptoms manifest, ensuring a more comprehensive eradication. By inspecting stations frequently to remove any rat remains and replenishing consumed bait, you help prevent reinfestation and minimise health risks. Once no further rodent activity is detected, dispose of any uneaten bait responsibly to avoid accidental contact with non-target species. NOPE! Rat Killer Grain Bait delivers a powerful, fast-acting method of rodent control when applied according to label directions. For professional-grade results and efficient pest management, rely on this advanced oat grain to eliminate rat/mice infestations and help protect your property from costly structural damage and health hazards.
